decisions.decision: Fixed auth/base.html Bootstrap CSS CDN by adding missing crossorigin=anonymous attribute
decisions.rationale: Without crossorigin=anonymous, browsers block stylesheets using SRI, leaving pages completely unstyled (scaffold bug)

decisions.decision: Styled sidebars with Slate-900 SaaS background and user profile footer cards
decisions.rationale: Meets premium aesthetic standards and provides dynamic initials-avatar and logout actions natively in sidebar

decisions.decision: Decoupled public pages into a dedicated marketing_base.html layout with a top navbar
decisions.rationale: Public views (Home, About, Contact) must not show the logged-in user sidebar to anonymous visitors

decisions.decision: Added a global flash message container inside base.html's main content column
decisions.rationale: Prevents flashed notifications from getting trapped in the session cookie and leaking on logout

next_action: Execute /gsd-ship to finalize Phase 2 branch, then run /gsd-plan-phase 3 to begin planning Phase 3 (Dashboard & Sidebar).
context_notes: Phase 2 auth system is 100% complete, visually styled, and fully verified by the user. All 10/10 manual and automated UAT tests successfully passed. Pytest suite passes 30/30 cleanly. Dev server cleanly shut down.
